fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Wyoming Licensed Dietitian Application — Requirements & Fees (2026)
seo.description: Apply for a Wyoming Licensed Dietitian credential. $200 application fee. Master's degree, 1,000 hours supervised practice, and CDR exam required.
seo.keywords: Wyoming dietitian license, WY licensed dietitian requirements, Wyoming Dietetics Licensing Board, Wyoming dietitian application fee

license_types.title: Licensed Dietitian
license_types.description: The credential required to practice dietetics in Wyoming. Wyoming is a 'Practice Act and Title Protection state', meaning you must hold this license to provide dietetic services.

steps.title: Complete Education & Supervised Practice
steps.description: Earn a master's degree and complete coursework from an ACEND-accredited program. Finish a minimum of 1,000 hours of supervised dietetics practice.

steps.title: Pass the CDR Examination
steps.description: Successfully pass the Commission on Dietetic Registration (CDR) Registration Examination for Dietitians. Verification of current RD status satisfies this.

steps.title: Submit the Application to the Board
steps.description: Complete the application form, gather required proof of citizenship, and submit the packet along with the $200 fee to the Wyoming Dietetics Licensing Board.

steps.title: Provide Verification Documents
steps.description: Ensure that the Commission on Dietetic Registration sends official verification of your active RD status directly to the Board.

documents.detail: Application accurately filled out along with proof of U.S. citizenship or lawful presence.
Proof of active registration sent directly from the CDR.

provisional_text: Wyoming regulations do not feature a standard provisional or temporary state license. You must complete the CDR examination before applying.
reciprocity_text: Wyoming offers licensure by endorsement. Applicants holding a valid and unrestricted license in another state with equivalent requirements, or holding active CDR registration, can apply using the standard application method by demonstrating out-of-state verification.

faqs.question: How much does a Wyoming dietitian license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial license application fee is $200.

faqs.question: When does the Wyoming license need to be renewed?
faqs.answer: Wyoming dietitian licenses expire biennially. The renewal fee is $200.

faqs.question: Is licensure required to practice in Wyoming?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wyoming has a Practice Act that legally mandates obtaining a state license to practice dietetics and to use the protected title of Dietitian.
